commands.name: dev-up
commands.description: Start development server with container-reload and minio storage

commands.name: dev-reset
commands.description: Rebuild entire stack from scratch, wiping volumes/cache

commands.name: test-backend
commands.description: Run full backing Pytest suite inside Docker container

commands.name: test-backend-app
commands.description: Run Django tests targeting a specific package, e.g. adminkit

commands.name: test-frontend
commands.description: Run Vitest client tests for customer-frontend

commands.name: migrate-public
commands.description: Apply migrations to the shared public DB schema

commands.name: migrate-tenants
commands.description: Apply migrations to all tenant DB schemas

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Validate format and safety conventions across active repository files

commands.name: typecheck
commands.description: Run TypeScript compilation checks across frontend workspaces

commands.name: sync-definitions
commands.description: Generate API TypeScript definitions inside frontend-customer
